cards.front: What is the main function of the Network Layer?
cards.back: To provide logical addressing, routing, and congestion control

cards.front: What type of switching is used at the Network Layer?
What is an IPv4 address used for?
cards.back: To uniquely identify devices on a network
A single packet of data sent over an IPv4 network

cards.front: What is the main difference between IPv4 and IPv6 addresses?
cards.back: IPv4 uses 32-bit addresses, while IPv6 uses 128-bit addresses
